fixesApplied.description: Removed py-16 md:py-24 from the container div in both DynamicContentCarousel and TestimonialsCarousel (TSX + PHP). The section-level py-10 sm:py-16 provides inter-block spacing, and the pseudo-element before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8 extends the charcoal background to cover the section padding zone. No inner container py-* is needed.

warnings: entrypoint size limit: js/editor (326 KiB), js/screen (352 KiB), css/screen (250 KiB)

syncStatus.details: TSX and PHP container div classes are identical in both blocks: 'container relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8'
